role_summary: the corporate finance advisor provides strategic financial advice on capital raising,  restructuring, and growth initiatives.   key responsibilitie s:  • advise on fundraising, debt, and equity transactions   • evaluate strategic investment and expansion opportunities   • support financial restructuring and turnaround projects   • prepare financial models and investor presentations   • liaise with investors, banks, and stakeholders   • support board -level financial decision -making
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong corporate finance and advisory expertise   • strategic thinking and communication skills
